name: maven_central_scraper
title: Maven Central Scraper
description: Search Maven Central packages or list version-history rows through the official Maven Central Solr JSON API, returning normalized JVM coordinates, package URLs, latest versions, packaging types, version counts, repository IDs, timestamps, file extensions, and tags.

logo.label: Maven Central M mark

seo.title: Maven Central Scraper Tool for JVM Package Metadata and Version History
seo.description: Search Maven Central with Better Fetch via the official Solr JSON API. Return group IDs, artifact IDs, latest versions, packaging types, version counts, repository IDs, timestamps, tags, file extensions, package URLs, and recent version rows.
seo.intro: Maven Central Scraper gives agents and developer tooling a structured route into the public JVM package index. Search by keyword, Maven group ID, artifact ID, packaging type, classifier, or SHA-1 checksum, or list recent version rows for one exact package. The tool normalizes group IDs, artifact IDs, coordinates, package URLs, latest versions, packaging labels, version counts, repository IDs, last-updated timestamps, file extensions, tags, version-specific URLs, POM URLs, and JAR URLs when available. It is designed for dependency discovery, Java and Kotlin ecosystem research, software supply-chain inventory, SBOM enrichment, stale dependency checks, package recommendation systems, and agent-readable JVM package context.

useCases.title: Dependency discovery
useCases.description: Search Maven Central by keyword, group ID, artifact ID, or packaging type and return compact package records with coordinates, latest versions, timestamps, and package URLs.

useCases.title: Version monitoring
useCases.description: List recent version rows for a known group ID and artifact ID to track release cadence, packaging, file extensions, and direct POM or JAR URLs.

useCases.title: Supply-chain inventory
useCases.description: Attach Maven Central version counts, repository IDs, update timestamps, tags, and canonical coordinates to SBOM, dependency audit, or developer portal datasets.

faqs.question: Does Maven Central Scraper require an API key?
faqs.answer: No. Version 0.1 uses Maven Central's public Solr search API through Better Fetch and only returns package metadata that is publicly visible.

faqs.question: Can it list versions for one artifact?
faqs.answer: Yes. Use versions mode with group_id and artifact_id to fetch bounded version-history rows from the Maven Central gav core.

faqs.question: Does it download package files or inspect dependencies?
faqs.answer: No. It returns metadata, package URLs, and direct POM or JAR URLs when those can be derived. It does not download artifacts, parse POM dependency graphs, or scan binaries.

mode.description: search = package search; versions = recent version rows for one exact group_id and artifact_id.

query.description: Keyword query for package search, such as spring, jackson, logging, kafka, or junit.

group_id.description: Optional Maven group ID filter, such as org.springframework.boot or com.fasterxml.jackson.core.

artifact_id.description: Optional Maven artifact ID filter, such as spring-boot-starter-web or jackson-databind.

packaging.description: Optional packaging filter such as jar, pom, aar, war, or bundle.

classifier.description: Optional classifier filter such as sources or javadoc.

sha1.description: Optional SHA-1 checksum lookup. When supplied, other search filters are ignored.

limit.description: Maximum package or version rows to return.

source_url.description: Maven Central Solr JSON URL fetched

count.description: Number of package or version rows returned

total_matches.description: Total matching rows reported by Maven Central

latest_version.description: Latest version reported by Maven Central

last_updated.description: Last update timestamp in ISO format

tags.description: Search tags returned by Maven Central

jar_url.description: Derived public JAR URL when packaging is jar

last_updated.description: Last update timestamp in ISO format

tags.description: Search tags returned by Maven Central
